subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden, O My leaf! Hearken unto the Voice of the Wronged One. From the direction of His Prison He hath turned toward thee and maketh mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و یا ورقتی ندای مظلوم را بشنو از شطر سجن بتو توجه نمود و ترا ذکر مینماید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
